notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep making villagers nonstop.
Scout to find sheep, berries, and your opponent's plan.
Put the next 4 villagers on wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build Houses as needed so you never get supply-blocked.
Keep most new villagers on food and add a Mill on berries.
Research the cheap economy upgrades — Abbasid villagers and tech are efficient.
Send 2 villagers to gold with a Mining Camp.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, age up through the House of Wisdom — pick the Economic Wing for a faster boom.
Keep gathering through the age-up and bank wood for a second Town Center.
Stay near the House of Wisdom so its Golden Age speeds your economy.
In Feudal, build a second Town Center to double your villager production.
Research Fresh Foodstuffs so new villagers are cheaper, and add an Archery Range or Stable for safety.
Pump villagers from both Town Centers and keep adding farms as sheep run out.
Make a few Spearmen or Archers to defend against early aggression.
Shift more villagers to gold to prepare for Castle Age units.
Begin the age-up through a second House of Wisdom wing (Military or Culture) once your economy is rolling.
In Castle Age, add Camel Riders or Camel Archers — they hard-counter enemy cavalry.
Reinforce with Crossbows and a Mangonel, then convert your eco lead into map control.
